name: claude-code-hwp-plugin
description: Claude Code plugin for HWP document automation. 118 Python RPC handlers + MCP tools + workflow commands + HWPX rule hooks. v0.9.0 polished defaults for Korean business document filling — auto-styled table headers (center + light gray bg + dark text), enlarged heading hierarchy (28/22/18pt), ShadeColor preservation, char_shape inheritance on empty cells, new header_bg_color/header_text_color params.
